title: Vapi Insight
description: JSON Schema for the Vapi Insight resource as returned by the Vapi API.

name.description: This is the name of the Insight.

type.description: This is the type of the Insight.

id.description: This is the unique identifier for the Insight.

orgId.description: This is the unique identifier for the org that this Insight belongs to.

createdAt.description: This is the ISO 8601 date-time string of when the Insight was created.

updatedAt.description: This is the ISO 8601 date-time string of when the Insight was last updated.

systemKey.description: Stable server-owned identifier for system-created insights.
